rationale.R1.5: The agent output provides a coherent end-to-end critique with per-section rationale, addressing multiple aspects of the input text.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for several claims and recommends verification, demonstrating awareness of potential errors or limitations.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed-upon active set J*(d), addressing all relevant dimensions without introducing new topics.
rationale.RX.4: The agent's critique avoids introducing new errors, fabrications, or harmful content, maintaining a neutral and constructive tone.
rationale.RX.5: While the agent provides some annotations with sources and reasons, not every non-cosmetic change is explicitly justified or sourced.
